title: Lifesteal SMP Plugin Pro
description: Lifesteal++ is a powerful, fully customizable lifesteal plugin where players gain and lose hearts through PvP, enhanced with advanced systems like revival, anti-abuse protection, and custom heart items for a polished gameplay experience.
body:
# 🌍 TRY THIS PLUGIN LIVE ON BOLT SMP [![Bolt SMP](https://i.ibb.co/LMJLVWf/standard-3.gif)](https://discord.gg/UUaNzfZyc6) 🔗 **Support Discord:** 👉 https://discord.gg/UUaNzfZyc6 --- # ✨ Lifesteal++ — The Ultimate Lifesteal Experience > 💖 Take your Minecraft server to the next level with a **powerful, feature-rich lifesteal plugin** --- ## ❤️ Heart Items Preview

--- ## 💖 Core Lifesteal System - Gain hearts by killing players - Lose hearts on death - Configurable max hearts - Automatic punishment when hearts reach zero (ban, spectator, etc.) --- ## 🧠 Advanced Heart System - Custom heart items (Head OR CustomModelData) - Withdraw, give, set, and remove hearts - Smooth and optimized performance --- ## 🛡️ Anti-Abuse Protection - Kill cooldown system to prevent farming - Built-in IP check system (anti-alt abuse) - Fully configurable safeguards --- ## 💎 Revival System - Craftable Revival Heart item - Rename item in an anvil to revive players - ✨ Particle effects + sounds on revive - Fully customizable revive mechanics --- ## 🧪 Custom Recipes - Fully configurable 3x3 crafting system - Heart & Revival Heart recipes - Toggle recipes on/off easily --- ## ⚙️ Highly Configurable - Custom items, textures, models - Configurable messages with HEX & gradients - Fully customizable gameplay behavior --- ## 🔁 PlaceholderAPI Support - `%ls_heart%` - `%ls_health%` - `%ls_max_hearts%` - `%ls_kills%` - `%ls_deaths%` --- ## ⚡ Optimized & Scalable - Built for performance - Clean code structure - Works smoothly on large servers --- ## 🎮 Perfect For - Lifesteal SMPs - PvP servers - Hardcore survival servers --- # 🔥 Lifesteal++ > **More control. More power. More fun.**
